title: TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM - 211info
text: LANE COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Identifies and treats tuberculosis (TB) disease. Screens high-risk individuals and provides medical management for those who test positive. 151 W 7th Avenue Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-11:30am and 1:15pm-4:30pm (541) 682-4041 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 682-4041 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and most private insurances. Offers sliding scale fees for uninsured patients. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Case/Care Management * Tuberculosis Tuberculosis Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON MOTHERSCARE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - NURSE FAMILY PARTNERSHIP PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM PUBLIC HEALTH - COMMUNICABLE DISEASE PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LANE COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH
